posts.text:
🚨BREAKING: Just days after attacking President Trump, actor Ben Stiller is YAWNING at new soda brand kick-off as he's completely ignored by the public.

No one cares about Trump-hating actors, Ben.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just said he doesn't do it for politics, he does "what's right."

"Political impacts, sure, everybody has concern. I have to do what's right."

God bless Trump.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just UNLEASHED on a fake news ABC reporter:

"One of the worst, most fake, most corrupt - You know what, ABC News? It may be the most corrupt news organizations on the planet! I think they're terrible!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Conan O’Brien just called out pedophiles at the 2026 Oscars.

“A British spokesperson said, ‘Yeah, well, at least we arrest our pedophiles.’”

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump is now flying back to Washington, D.C. as a MAJORITY OF AMERICANS approve of his strike on Iran by +10 points, per McLaughlin.

We the People STAND WITH TRUMP!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: The US just BEAT CANADA AGAIN at hockey and won a GOLD MEDAL at the 2026 Winter Paralympics.

With President Trump in charge, the USA just can't stop winning!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Pro-Trump Iranian Americans just DROWNED OUT Leftist protestors with a "Make Iran Great Again" march in NYC.

We the People LOVE TRUMP!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: A Maine high school was just SUED by a patriotic father after they didn't allow students to recite the U.S. National Anthem.

God bless this father!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Virginia Sheriff Stacey Kincaid was just EXPOSED for shielding an illegal alien from ICE who has groped school girls at least 9 TIMES in past months.

This "Sheriff" needs to be arrested!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: @KidRock just STOOD UP for his fans and proud Americans being ripped off by major corporations at concerts.

"They can come after me all they want. I don’t give a damn. But you come after my fans... That’s a JOKE."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: CNN's Jake Tapper just ADMITTED Democrats are LYING about funding DHS and called out Cory Booker to HIS FACE on Live TV.

"Isn't it TIME for Democrats to reopen DHS?... [Republicans] want the WHOLE agency funded."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

PRESIDENT TRUMP: “Some major politicians refuse to say the word God. They don’t want to say it. I say it.”

Thank you, Mr. President.

God bless you.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: This 26 year old video of President Trump has remerged and gone viral proving he's ALWAYS been consistent.

God bless you, Mr. Best President!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Virginia State Rep. Tom Garrett just UNLEASHED on Virginia Democrats trying to make nearly all Virginia gun owners CRIMINALS if their new bill becomes law.

God bless State Rep. Garrett!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Switzerland police just brought out the WATER CANNONS to put a stop to Marxists and pro-Islamist rioters in the streets.

Can this be done in America?

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: This retired Police Officer and now school bus driver just went viral for leaving his job rather than take off his MAGA hat.

The school district banning the MAGA hat should be DEFUNDED!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Democrats going BERSERK as pro-gun activists pass out 30-round AR-15 magazines for FREE outside of the Virginia State Capitol before it's set to BAN the sale of these magazines.

What about the 2nd Amendment?

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: For the first time in NEARLY A DECADE, the United States flag was just raised over Venezuela's U.S. embassy under President Trump.

God bless Trump, who history will look back on as the GREATEST PRESIDENT EVER!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Gavin Newsom has been EXPOSED for an estimated HALF A TRILLION DOLLARS of fraud in taxpayer funds under his leadership.

These fraudsters need to be held responsible!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Congressman @realBrandonGill is going viral for his refusal to vote for any Senate bill besides DHS funding until the SAVE America Act is passed by the Senate.

God bless Rep. Brandon Gill!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video
